name: @postman-cse/onboarding-tdd
description: Postman onboarding TDD preview GitHub Action.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --banner:js='import { createRequire as __createRequire } from "node:module"; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);' --define:__ACTION_VERSION__=\"$npm_package_version\" --outfile=dist/action.mjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist
